commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a D1 migration to seed openclaw/crabline from openclaw/multipass, move cards and workflow rows, and disable the old multipass repo row.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a data-migration/admin cutover PR rather than a bug report. I did verify the core migration path with an in-memory SQLite smoke check.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; this maintainer-authored migration needs normal review of the intended repo cutover.

target.title: chore: migrate multipass repo seed to crabline
target.body:
## Summary
- add a D1 migration to cut over the seeded repo allowlist from openclaw/multipass to openclaw/crabline
- move existing card and repo workflow rows to the new repo name
- remove the stale openclaw/multipass repo row after migration

## Verification
- sqlite3 :memory: '.read migrations/0001_initial.sql' '.read migrations/0005_openclaw_repos.sql' '.read migrations/0008_repo_workflows.sql' '.read migrations/0019_crabline_repo_cutover.sql' "select repo from repos where repo in ('openclaw/multipass','openclaw/crabline') order by repo;"
- pnpm check *(fails on existing lint debt unrelated to this SQL-only change: curly/no-array-sort/etc. in existing source files)*
target.author: romneyda
